title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer! I shall take good
care of these and use them to decorate my room!
choice_data_list: Won't they all take up a lot of space?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, these are tiny compared to the ones I
brought from home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In fact, this size would be easier to snuggle up
with and fall asle—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you won these plushies for me, so I shall
treasure them always!
